1374.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'During the Night Journey, I was brought a vessel of milk and a vessel of wine. I chose the milk, and Jibril said: You have chosen the fitrah. Had you chosen the wine, your nation would have gone astray.'
1374.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Pada malam Isra, aku dibawakan satu bejana susu dan satu bejana khamr. Aku memilih susu, maka Jibril berkata: Engkau telah memilih fitrah. Seandainya engkau memilih khamr, niscaya umatmu akan tersesat.'

1375.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I was the cup-bearer for a group of people in the house of Abu Talhah when the prohibition of wine was revealed. The caller called out and Abu Talhah said: Go out and see what this voice is. I went out and returned saying: This is a caller announcing that wine has been forbidden. He said to me: Go and pour it out. And I poured it into the streets of Madinah.'
1375.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku sedang menuangkan minuman bagi sekelompok orang di rumah Abu Thalhah ketika turun pengharaman khamr. Seorang penyeru berseru, lalu Abu Thalhah berkata: Keluarlah dan lihatlah suara apa ini. Aku keluar lalu kembali sambil berkata: Ini adalah seorang penyeru yang mengumumkan bahwa khamr telah diharamkan. Ia berkata kepadaku: Pergi dan tumpahkanlah. Maka aku menumpahkannya di jalan-jalan Madinah.'

1376.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever drinks wine in this world and does not repent from it, he will be deprived of it in the Hereafter.'
1376.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa meminum khamr di dunia ini dan tidak bertaubat darinya, maka ia akan diharamkan darinya di akhirat.'

1377.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Amr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Wine is the mother of all evil and the greatest of major sins. Whoever drinks it may come to commit fornication with his mother, his maternal aunt, and his paternal aunt.'
1377.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Amr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Khamr adalah induk segala kejahatan dan dosa besar yang paling besar. Barangsiapa meminumnya, ia mungkin sampai menzinahi ibunya, bibi dari pihak ibunya, dan bibi dari pihak ayahnya.'

1378.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day, let him not sit at a table at which wine is drunk.'
1378.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa beriman kepada Allah dan hari akhir, maka janganlah ia duduk di meja makan yang di situ diminum khamr.'

1379.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Amr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The adulterer, the thief, and the wine-drinker will not enter Paradise.'
1379.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Amr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Pezina, pencuri, dan peminum khamr tidak akan masuk surga.'

1380.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Amr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Three types of people will not enter Paradise: the one who is disobedient to his parents, the one who habitually drinks wine, and the one who reminds people of his favors to them.'
1380.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Amr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tiga golongan tidak akan masuk surga: orang yang durhaka kepada kedua orang tuanya, orang yang kecanduan khamr, dan orang yang selalu mengungkit-ungkit pemberiannya.'

1381.iwh_en: It was narrated from Suwayd ibn Tariq (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Prophet ﷺ about wine and the Prophet ﷺ forbade it. He said: It is used as medicine. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'It is not a medicine; it is a disease.'
1381.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Suwayd ibn Thariq (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ tentang khamr dan Nabi ﷺ melarangnya. Ia berkata: Khamr digunakan sebagai obat. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Khamr bukan obat; ia adalah penyakit.'

1382.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Wine comes from two trees: the date palm and the grapevine.'
1382.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Khamr berasal dari dua pohon: pohon kurma dan pohon anggur.'

1383.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Every intoxicating drink is forbidden.'
1383.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Setiap minuman yang memabukkan adalah haram.'

1384.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Musa al-Ashari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ sent him and Muadh ibn Jabal to Yemen and said: 'Every intoxicating drink is forbidden.'
1384.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Musa al-Asy'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengutus dia dan Muadz ibn Jabal ke Yaman dan bersabda: 'Setiap minuman yang memabukkan adalah haram.'

1385.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I forbid you from every small amount of that which intoxicates in large amounts.'
1385.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku melarang kalian dari setiap jumlah kecil dari sesuatu yang memabukkan dalam jumlah besar.'

1386.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The first thing to be overturned in Islam as a vessel is wine.' It was said: How is that? She said: 'Because a woman from the Ansar had wine and it was forbidden, so she poured it out.'
1386.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Hal pertama yang ditumpahkan dalam Islam bagaikan bejana yang dibalikkan adalah khamr.' Ditanyakan: Bagaimana itu? Ia berkata: 'Karena seorang wanita dari Anshar memiliki khamr lalu diharamkan, maka ia menumpahkannya.'

1387.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ubaydah ibn al-Jarrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'There will come upon my nation a time when people will make wine lawful by giving it another name, and musical instruments will be played for them. Allah will cause the earth to swallow them up and will transform them into apes and pigs.'
1387.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ubaidah ibn al-Jarrah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Akan datang kepada umatku suatu masa di mana orang-orang akan menghalalkan khamr dengan memberinya nama lain, dan alat-alat musik akan dimainkan untuk mereka. Allah akan membenamkan mereka ke dalam bumi dan akan mengubah mereka menjadi kera dan babi.'

1388.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Mughirah ibn Shubah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever sells wine should slash the pigs, for Allah has not authorized their selling.'
1388.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Mughirah ibn Syubah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa menjual khamr, hendaklah ia menyembelih babi, karena Allah tidak mengizinkan penjualannya.'

1389.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man brought a small container of wine to the Prophet ﷺ as a gift. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Do you not know that Allah has forbidden it?' The man said: No. He asked one of his companions and the companion confirmed it. So the man said to one who was with him: Go and sell it. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Indeed the One who forbade drinking it has forbidden selling it.' So the man opened the container and poured it out.
1389.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki membawa tempat kecil berisi khamr kepada Nabi ﷺ sebagai hadiah. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apakah engkau tidak mengetahui bahwa Allah telah mengharamkannya?' Laki-laki itu berkata: Tidak. Ia bertanya kepada salah seorang sahabatnya dan sahabat itu membenarkannya. Maka laki-laki itu berkata kepada orang yang bersamanya: Pergi dan jualah. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Yang mengharamkan meminumnya juga mengharamkan menjualnya.' Maka laki-laki itu membuka tempatnya dan menumpahkannya.'

1390.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'May Allah curse the Jews — fat was forbidden for them, so they melted it down and sold it and ate its price.'
1390.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Semoga Allah melaknat orang-orang Yahudi — lemak diharamkan bagi mereka, lalu mereka mencairkannya dan menjualnya serta memakan hasil penjualannya.'

1391.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever drinks wine, flog him. If he drinks it again, flog him. If he drinks it a third time, flog him. If he drinks it a fourth time, kill him.' Abu Hurairah said: A man was brought to the Prophet ﷺ who had drunk wine four times but the Prophet ﷺ did not kill him; he only flogged him.
1391.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa meminum khamr, cambuklah ia. Jika ia meminumnya lagi, cambuklah ia. Jika ia meminumnya ketiga kali, cambuklah ia. Jika ia meminumnya keempat kali, bunuhlah ia.' Abu Hurairah berkata: Seorang laki-laki dibawa kepada Nabi ﷺ yang telah meminum khamr empat kali, namun Nabi ﷺ tidak membunuhnya; beliau hanya mencambuknya.'

1392.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The fornicator is not a believer while he is fornicating, the thief is not a believer while he is stealing, and the wine-drinker is not a believer while he is drinking.'
1392.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Pezina tidak beriman saat ia berzina, pencuri tidak beriman saat ia mencuri, dan peminum khamr tidak beriman saat ia meminumnya.'

1393.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that nabidh was made for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in a waterskin. When the opening of the waterskin had become narrow, it was poured for him in a vessel.
1393.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa nabidz dibuat untuk Rasulullah ﷺ dalam sebuah girbah (tempat air dari kulit). Ketika mulut girbah itu menjadi sempit, maka dituangkan untuknya ke dalam sebuah bejana.'

1394.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Daylami (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I went to Abd Allah ibn Amr and said: We live in a land in Yemen where there is a vineyard, and we press wine from it — shall we drink it?' He said: 'No.' I said: 'We mix it with water to lessen its strength.' He said: 'No, not even that.' Then he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited every intoxicating drink.'
1394.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Daylami (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku pergi menemui Abdullah ibn Amr dan berkata: Kami tinggal di sebuah daerah di Yaman yang terdapat kebun anggur, dan kami memeras khamr darinya — apakah kami boleh meminumnya?' Ia berkata: 'Tidak.' Aku berkata: 'Kami mencampurnya dengan air untuk mengurangi kekuatannya.' Ia berkata: 'Tidak, bahkan itu pun tidak.' Kemudian ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ melarang setiap minuman yang memabukkan.'

1395.iwh_en: It was narrated from Said ibn Jubayr that he asked Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) about nabidh made in clay jars. Ibn Umar said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited nabidh in clay jars.' Said said: 'So I asked Ibn Abbas and he said the same.'
1395.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Said ibn Jubair bahwa ia bertanya kepada Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang nabidz yang dibuat dalam kendi tanah liat. Ibn Umar berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ melarang nabidz dalam kendi tanah liat.' Said berkata: 'Lalu aku bertanya kepada Ibn Abbas dan ia mengatakan hal yang sama.'

1396.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited making nabidh in gourd vessels and pitch-lined containers.'
1396.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ melarang membuat nabidz dalam bejana labu dan wadah yang dilapisi tar.'

1397.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited nabidh in clay jars and gourd vessels.
1397.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang nabidz dalam kendi tanah liat dan bejana labu.'

1398.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Whoever wants to forbid what Allah has forbidden, let him forbid nabidh, for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade it.'
1398.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Barangsiapa ingin mengharamkan apa yang Allah haramkan, hendaklah ia mengharamkan nabidz, karena Rasulullah ﷺ telah melarangnya.'

1399.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited clay jars, gourd vessels, pitch-lined containers, green glazed jugs, and mixing unripe dates with fresh dates.
1399.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang kendi tanah liat, bejana labu, wadah yang dilapisi tar, kendi hijau mengkilap, dan mencampur kurma muda dengan kurma segar.'

1400.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Mughaffal (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited gourd vessels, clay jars, and vessels carved from wood.
1400.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Mughaffal (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang bejana labu, kendi tanah liat, dan bejana yang diukir dari kayu.'

1401.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not mix unripe dates with fresh dates, and do not mix raisins with dates. Make each one separately.'
1401.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jangan mencampur kurma muda dengan kurma segar, dan jangan mencampur kismis dengan kurma. Buatlah masing-masing secara terpisah.'

1402.iwh_en: It was narrated from Wail ibn Hujr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not say al-karm (the vineyard), but say al-inab (the grape) or al-hablah (the vine).'
1402.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Wail ibn Hujr (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jangan katakan al-karm (kebun anggur), tetapi katakanlah al-inab (buah anggur) atau al-hablah (pohon anggur).'

1403.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that Abu Talhah had some wine belonging to orphans. When the prohibition of wine was revealed, he came to the Prophet ﷺ and mentioned that to him. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Pour it out.' He said: Shall I not make vinegar of it? The Prophet ﷺ said: 'No.'
1403.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Abu Thalhah memiliki khamr milik anak-anak yatim. Ketika turun pengharaman khamr, ia datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan menyebutkan hal itu kepada beliau. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tumpahkanlah.' Ia berkata: Bolehkah aku menjadikannya cuka? Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak.'

1404.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was brought some milk and he drank from it. On his left was Abu Bakr and on his right was a Bedouin. He gave it to the Bedouin and said: 'The right side, then the right side.'
1404.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ dibawakan susu dan beliau meminumnya. Di sebelah kirinya ada Abu Bakar dan di sebelah kanannya ada seorang Badui. Beliau memberikannya kepada si Badui dan bersabda: 'Yang kanan, kemudian yang kanan.'

1405.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited drinking directly from the mouth of a waterskin.
1405.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang minum langsung dari mulut girbah (tempat air dari kulit).'

1406.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited drinking directly from the mouth of a waterskin.
1406.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang minum langsung dari mulut girbah (tempat air dari kulit).'

1407.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited bending or folding the waterskin to drink from it.
1407.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang membengkokkan atau melipat girbah untuk diminum darinya.'

1408.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to breathe into the vessel two or three times when drinking.
1408.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bernapas di luar bejana dua atau tiga kali ketika minum.'

1409.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man said: O Messenger of Allah, I cannot be satisfied from one breath. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Then remove the vessel from your mouth and then breathe. If you see something unpleasant in it, pour it out.'
1409.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki berkata: Wahai Rasulullah, aku tidak bisa kenyang dalam satu napas. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Maka jauhkan bejana dari mulutmu lalu bernapaslah. Jika kamu melihat sesuatu yang tidak menyenangkan di dalamnya, tumpahkanlah.'

1410.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When one of you goes to relieve himself, let him not touch his private part with his right hand, and let him not clean himself with his right hand, and let him not breathe into a vessel.'
1410.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang di antara kalian pergi untuk buang hajat, maka janganlah ia menyentuh kemaluannya dengan tangan kanan, dan janganlah ia membersihkan diri dengan tangan kanan, dan janganlah ia bernapas ke dalam bejana.'

1411.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ visited a sick Ansari man. There was a stream flowing by the house, so the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do you have a waterskin kept overnight?' The man said: Yes. So he brought it and he drank from it.
1411.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengunjungi seorang laki-laki Anshar yang sakit. Ada sebuah sungai kecil mengalir di dekat rumah itu, maka Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apakah engkau memiliki air yang disimpan dalam tempat kulit semalam?' Laki-laki itu berkata: Ya. Lalu ia membawanya dan beliau minum darinya.'

1412.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) on the authority of Umm Sulaym that the Prophet ﷺ came to her and drank water while standing, from the mouth of a waterskin.
1412.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dari Umm Sulaim bahwa Nabi ﷺ datang kepadanya dan minum air sambil berdiri, dari mulut girbah.'

1413.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'In the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ we used to drink while standing and eat while walking.'
1413.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Di zaman Rasulullah ﷺ kami biasa minum sambil berdiri dan makan sambil berjalan.'

1414.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited drinking while standing. He said: Eating while standing is even worse.
1414.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang minum sambil berdiri. Ia berkata: Makan sambil berdiri bahkan lebih buruk dari itu.'

1415.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ saw a man drinking while standing. He said to him: 'Vomit it out.' The man said: Why? He said: 'Would it please you to drink with a cat?' He said: No. He said: 'You drank with something worse than a cat — you drank with the devil.'
1415.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melihat seorang laki-laki minum sambil berdiri. Beliau berkata kepadanya: 'Muntahkanlah.' Laki-laki itu berkata: Mengapa? Beliau berkata: 'Apakah engkau senang minum bersama kucing?' Ia berkata: Tidak. Beliau berkata: 'Engkau telah minum bersama sesuatu yang lebih buruk dari kucing — engkau minum bersama setan.'

1416.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Salamah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever drinks from a silver vessel is only gurgling hellfire in his belly.'
1416.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Salamah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa minum dari bejana perak, maka ia hanyalah menggelembungkan api neraka di perutnya.'

1417.iwh_en: It was narrated from Hudhayfah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked for water in the land of al-Mada'in and a Persian landowner brought him a silver vessel. Hudhayfah threw it at him and said: 'I have already told him once that the Prophet ﷺ prohibited this, but he did not stop.'
1417.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Hudzaifah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia meminta air di daerah al-Mada'in dan seorang tuan tanah Persia membawakan bejana perak. Hudzaifah melemparnya kepada tuan tanah itu dan berkata: 'Aku telah memberitahunya sekali bahwa Nabi ﷺ melarang ini, tetapi ia tidak berhenti.'

1418.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Humayd al-Saidi (may Allah be pleased with him) that he brought milk to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from Naqi. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Why did you not cover it, even if only with a stick?'
1418.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Humaid al-Saidi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia membawa susu kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dari Naqi'. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Mengapa engkau tidak menutupnya, sekalipun hanya dengan sebatang kayu?'

1419.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurairah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'We were commanded to cover the ablution water, tie the mouth of the waterskin, and to turn the vessel upside down.'
1419.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kami diperintahkan untuk menutup air wudhu, mengikat mulut girbah, dan membalikkan bejana.'

1420.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Said al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that Marwan asked him: Did you hear the Prophet ﷺ prohibit blowing into a drink? Abu Said said: Yes. Marwan said: Then what about the tubes [used for blowing]? Abu Said said: That is worse.
1420.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Said al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Marwan bertanya kepadanya: Apakah engkau mendengar Nabi ﷺ melarang meniup ke dalam minuman? Abu Said berkata: Ya. Marwan berkata: Lalu bagaimana dengan pipa-pipa (yang digunakan untuk meniup)? Abu Said berkata: Itu lebih buruk.'

1421.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prohibited blowing into a drink.
1421.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang meniup ke dalam minuman.'

1422.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Qatadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The one who serves the people is the last to drink.'
1422.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Qatadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang melayani manusia adalah yang terakhir minum.'
